title: bowlesia incana
intro: Bowlesia incana, also known as the hairy buttonweed, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to the Andean region of South America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bowlesia incana include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
